_doc: Audience presets for tools/email/send-digest.py and other team-comms scripts. Each audience has a 'to' list (primary recipients) and optional 'cc' list. Resolved at send time when --audience <key> is passed; explicit --to / --cc on the command line override these. Update here, not in the script.

weekly-leadership.description: Internal weekly digest audience — founders + GTM leadership. Verified 2026-05-25.

cyvore-team.description: Default Cyvore-team CC for customer-facing comms. Mirrors DEFAULT_CYVORE_TEAM_CC in tools/email/send-release-note.py.
